provenance.source_status: Exact candidate text captured for controlled evaluation

intended_use: Audit mixed software corpora and reports
Separate implementation from specification and surrogate tests
Reproduce security claims before accepting fixes
Audit the evidentiary quality of prior audits
mechanism_hypotheses: Concrete apparent evidentiary hazards elicit more operational scrutiny than generic requests to be critical
Mandatory category separation reduces implementation/specification conflation
Exact execution and adversarial matrices reduce unsupported fix claims
claims_not_established: Every token or framing element is load-bearing
